result.stdout:
Description:
  Benchmark project generator for .NET solutions

Usage:
  Benchmark.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <solution-path>        Generate benchmark projects for a .NET solution
  run-and-report <solution-path>  Generate benchmarks, run them, and create comprehensive markdown reports

commands.payload:
Description:
  Benchmark project generator for .NET solutions

Usage:
  Benchmark.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <solution-path>        Generate benchmark projects for a .NET solution
  run-and-report <solution-path>  Generate benchmarks, run them, and create comprehensive markdown reports

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate benchmark projects for a .NET solution

Usage:
  Benchmark.Cli generate <solution-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <solution-path>  Path to the .NET solution file (.sln or .slnx)

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate benchmark projects for a .NET solution

Usage:
  Benchmark.Cli generate <solution-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <solution-path>  Path to the .NET solution file (.sln or .slnx)

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate benchmarks, run them, and create comprehensive markdown reports

Usage:
  Benchmark.Cli run-and-report <solution-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <solution-path>  Path to the .NET solution file (.sln or .slnx)

Options:
  --output <output>  Output path for the markdown report (defaults to BenchmarkReport.md in solution directory) []
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
